name: agentsource-plugin
description: Find and export B2B companies or contacts using AgentSource filters with options for enrichment, events, and CSV export.

install.description: Copies bin/agentsource.py to ~/.agentsource/bin/ and optionally saves API key to ~/.agentsource/config.json (mode 600). No external downloads.

data_privacy.data_sent: API key (header), search filters, entity IDs. Free-text call_reasoning is opt-in only.
